hero_product_name: the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS electric wheelchair from the white-background reference photos
campaign_goal: Refresh the final packaging for the existing three-scene AnyWell creative with more elegant subtitle styling and a softer, more artistic English voiceover.
target_audience: Clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size older adults, their spouses, and adult children buying mobility support for loved ones.
core_selling_points:
- 22-inch wide seat
- 330 lb capacity
- smooth 500W power
- FDA-cleared safety
- 30-day trial and easy returns
- PayPal financing
use_scenarios:
- back doorway threshold
- wooded backyard path
- open path near the tree line
visual_style: Warm, realistic, cinematic, portrait-first Western lifestyle advertising with route continuity and restrained emotional tone.
style_tone: warm, calm, credible, dignified, cinematic, never melodramatic
consistency_anchor: Match the real YS16-1 PLUS wheelchair from the white-background product photos in its normal open riding position only. Preserve the right-side joystick, wide seat feel, armrests, front caster, large drive wheel profile, tubular frame, footrest shape, and two tall black rear caregiver push handles above the backrest. Each rear push handle must end in a visible short black grip and also show the small pinchable hand-control / squeeze-brake lever beneath or just in front of the grip. Do not render plain bare tubes without that pinchable lever detail. Do not show any rear/lower external battery pack, cable, folded form, semi-folded form, storage form, or rear-facing angle.
additional_info: Keep the exact same rider, same wife, same wardrobe, same route direction, and same self-operated joystick logic across all three scenes. Do not regenerate the visual route; this packaging pass should reuse the already approved storyboard and resolved clips. The goal is a softer, more refined finish: gentle female English narration, short readable subtitle hooks, and a more polished, eye-catching subtitle style for senior viewers.
music: Warm restrained cinematic underscore with soft ambient texture.

concepts.title: One Continuous Route Refined
concepts.core_theme: The same rider moves from home into nature with dignity, independence, and quiet product confidence.
concepts.main_theme: Freedom should feel steady and close to home.
concepts.cta: See how AnyWell helps bring the outdoors back within reach.
concepts.visual_style: Soft morning-to-daylight route progression, natural greenery, realistic portrait framing, same rider and partner throughout.
concepts.continuity_rider_anchor: Keep the exact same clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size silver-haired older man and the exact same wife across all three shots. Preserve his broad torso and shoulders, rounded belly, thicker arms and legs, heavier seated posture, silver hair, clean-shaven soft face, charcoal knit jacket, muted blue shirt, dark trousers, and joystick-side orientation consistently. Keep the same rear push-handle geometry too: each handle needs a visible short grip plus a small pinchable squeeze lever.
concepts.use_scenarios:
- doorway threshold
- wooded backyard path
- brighter open path near trees
concepts.additional_info: Reuse the approved visuals from the previous pass. Only refresh the audio and subtitle packaging. The spoken lines should feel gentler, more artful, and more emotionally mature, while the subtitle hooks stay short, large, and sales-relevant.

shots.scene_description: The same clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size silver-haired American man in his 60s sits in the AnyWell YS16-1 PLUS at a quiet back doorway threshold, visibly filling the seat with his broad torso, rounded belly, thicker arms and legs, and heavier seated posture. He wears a charcoal knit zip jacket over a muted blue shirt with dark trousers. His right hand rests clearly on the right-side joystick controller as he independently begins moving left to right out of the doorway. The same wife in a cream cardigan and muted blue top follows nearby with warm relaxed body language, never touching the chair. The camera stays on the joystick-side front profile so the viewer sees his front torso, soft side profile, right forearm, joystick hand, front caster, armrest, side wheel profile, and the two tall black rear caregiver push handles above the backrest. Each rear handle must show a short grip and a small visible pinchable squeeze lever beneath or just ahead of the grip. The back panel and lower rear quadrant remain hidden.
shots.camera_movement: smooth joystick-side front-profile push beginning nearly still at the doorway and easing outward as the chair starts forward
shots.lighting: soft morning daylight with gentle natural spill from the doorway and clean outdoor highlights
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium-wide front-side composition with visible doorway threshold behind him, rider and chair large in frame, anonymous North American home details only, no readable signage
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair fully off the threshold and continuing left to right toward the wooded path
shots.voiceover_en: At the doorway, freedom begins in his own hand. The 22-inch seat feels calm and secure.
shots.key_message: Independent driving and wide-seat comfort are clear from the first shot.
shots.sfx: soft wheel roll, distant birds, light morning ambience

shots.scene_description: The exact same clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size silver-haired man continues along a narrower wooded backyard path, still moving left to right in the same wheelchair with his right hand clearly on the joystick and independently controlling the chair. His body type, clothing, posture, silver hair, clean-shaven soft face, and seat-filling silhouette remain obviously identical to scene one. The same wife walks a step to the side, keeping pace without touching the chair. The camera tracks from the joystick-side front profile so his front torso, soft facial profile, right forearm, joystick hand, armrest, side wheel profile, and the two tall black rear caregiver push handles remain readable. Each rear handle must again show the short grip and the small pinchable squeeze lever detail. Greenery is closer to camera and the house feels farther behind, making this clearly the middle of the route.
shots.camera_movement: steady joystick-side front-profile tracking shot with subtle forward drift and natural parallax from nearby leaves and branches
shots.lighting: filtered daylight through trees with realistic contrast and soft natural shadows
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait medium shot with shrubs and leaves closer to camera, rider and chair taking most of the frame height, spouse softly visible beside him, home distant or obscured
shots.transition_anchor: end with the chair approaching a brighter opening in the trees while still moving left to right
shots.voiceover_en: On the path, 500 watts of smooth power and 330-pound support keep the ride steady.
shots.key_message: Power and steady control read clearly in the middle shot.
shots.sfx: soft gravel texture, leaves moving lightly, outdoor air

shots.scene_description: The exact same clearly obese, heavyset, plus-size silver-haired man and the same wife emerge into a brighter open path near the tree line, with more sky and open space than the previous shot. He remains clearly the same rider with the same charcoal jacket, muted blue shirt, dark trousers, silver hair, clean-shaven soft face, broad torso, rounded belly, thicker arms and legs, and heavier seat-filling posture. He continues moving left to right with his right hand visible on the joystick while the wife walks beside him at the same pace without pushing. The camera stays front-side on the joystick side, showing his chest or soft side profile, right forearm, joystick hand, front-side wheelchair profile, and the two tall black rear caregiver push handles above the backrest. Each rear handle must still show the short grip and the small pinchable squeeze lever detail, never a plain bare tube. Never show his back or the lower rear quadrant.
shots.camera_movement: gentle front-side moving settle that follows the final glide into a calm hero frame without becoming a portrait close-up
shots.lighting: clean daylight with a brighter open feel, soft skin-tone rolloff, and realistic depth
shots.composition_and_set_dressing: portrait hero composition with more sky and open space than scene two, path and trees framing the pair, rider and chair prominent, no dense foliage crowding the frame
shots.transition_anchor: end on a calm confident hold suitable for a branded close
shots.voiceover_en: When the family is ready, AnyWell adds FDA-cleared confidence, easy returns, and PayPal financing.
shots.subtitle_text: FDA-cleared. 30-day trial. Easy returns. PayPal financing.
shots.key_message: The close lands on trust signals in short readable phrases.
shots.sfx: light footsteps beside the chair, soft breeze, distant birds
